intro: Hieracium tenuiceps, also known as slender hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion-like flowering plants in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium tenuiceps include flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
